title: corybas orbiculatus
intro: Corybas orbiculatus, also known as the helmet orchid, is a species of orchid native to Australia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Corybas orbiculatus include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
